# tableofcontent

## Import

```typescript
import { TableOfContentLinkDirective, TableOfContentComponent } from '@lucca-front/ng/table-of-content';
```

## API Reference

### TableOfContentLinkDirective (directive)

**Selector:** `[luTableOfContentLink]`

### TableOfContentComponent (component)

**Selector:** `lu-table-of-content`
